description.zh: 插件作者工作台 · 在 Studio 内编辑 .forgeax/plugins/<slug>/ 下的本地插件:左侧文件树 + 右侧文本编辑器,保存即写回并后台热重载注册表;配合 fork / record-as-skill 创建插件。
description.en: Plugin Author workbench — an in-app editor for local plugins under .forgeax/plugins/<slug>/: a left file tree + right text editor; saving writes back and hot-reloads the plugin registry in the background. Pairs with fork / record-as-skill to create a plugin.
